look.text: Lt. Cog, cataloguing the station's tidiness with visible professional respect.

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "The song is in D minor, transposed from sky-ray calls. Technically flawless. Also: sixty years is 1,893,456,000 seconds, and it counted every one. Draw your own conclusion, Ensign."

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "For the record: introducing the lonely station to the neighbours was superior to switching it off. I have logged this as 'timing.'"

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "The joke remains in reserve. This station's morale requirements are... complicated."

itemUse.speaker: target
itemUse.text: "Still an android, Ensign. Your diligence is noted."

look.text: Counselor Solace, one hand resting on the wall like she's taking the station's pulse.

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "It isn't malfunction, Ensign. Listen past the deflection: 'visitors, previous, zero.' It's LONELY. It doesn't need repairing — it needs someone to sing to."

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "Contentment, everywhere, like sunlight on the water. Sixty years, and it took us an afternoon."

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "Whatever's here — it isn't angry. It's glad we came. Fiercely glad."

itemUse.speaker: target
itemUse.text: "Ensign. We TALKED about this. Diary. Dinner. Aloud."
